rgb(255, 255, 255)))">Using Promoto has completely transformed how we engage with our customers. Our campaigns are now faster, smarter, and more effective than ever.</h5></div><div class="framer-9r5m7g" data-framer-name="Review 2" data-framer-component-type="RichTextContainer" style="--extracted-1lwpl3i:var(--token-cd760577-4317-4691-be28-d635a64368a1, rgb(255, 255, 255));--framer-paragraph-spacing:0px;opacity:0;transform:none"><h5 class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-aqcnf3" data-styles-preset="aGbWDzhqU" style="--framer-text-alignment:center;--framer-text-color:var(--extracted-1lwpl3i, var(--token-cd760577-4317-4691-be28-d635a64368a1, rgb(255, 255, 255)))">Promoto transformed how we connect with our customers. The automation workflows saved us hours each week and boosted engagement instantly.</h5></div><div class="framer-14mr040" data-framer-name="Review 3" data-framer-component-type="RichTextContainer" style="--extracted-1lwpl3i:var(--token-cd760577-4317-4691-be28-d635a64368a1, rgb(255, 255, 255));--framer-paragraph-spacing:0px;opacity:0;transform:none"><h5 class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-aqcnf3" data-styles-preset="aGbWDzhqU" style="--framer-text-alignment:center;--framer-text-color:var(--extracted-1lwpl3i, var(--token-cd760577-4317-4691-be28-d635a64368a1, rgb(255, 255, 255)))">I’ve tried several marketing tools, but Promoto’s ease of use and powerful integrations make it stand out. Our campaigns feel smarter and more personalized.</h5></div><div class="framer-1qlcbfk" data-framer-name="Review 4" data-framer-component-type="RichTextContainer" style="--extracted-1lwpl3i:var(--token-cd760577-4317-4691-be28-d635a64368a1, rgb(255, 255, 255));--framer-paragraph-spacing:0px;opacity:0;transform:none"><h5 class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-aqcnf3" data-styles-preset="aGbWDzhqU" style="--framer-text-alignment:center;--framer-text-color:var(--extracted-1lwpl3i, var(--token-cd760577-4317-4691-be28-d635a64368a1, rgb(255, 255, 255)))">The analytics and reporting features give us real-time insights. We can see what works and adjust quickly—our ROI has never been this clear.</h5></div><div class="framer-1a0y9ef" data-framer-name="Review 5" data-framer-component-type="RichTextContainer" style="--extracted-1lwpl3i:var(--token-cd760577-4317-4691-be28-d635a64368a1, rgb(255, 255, 255));--framer-paragraph-spacing:0px;opacity:0;transform:none"><h5 class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-aqcnf3" data-styles-preset="aGbWDzhqU" style="--framer-text-alignment:center;--framer-text-color:var(--extracted-1lwpl3i, var(--token-cd760577-4317-4691-be28-d635a64368a1, rgb(255, 255, 255)))">What I love most about Promoto is the support team. They’re quick, helpful, and genuinely care about our success. It feels like they’re part of our team.</h5></div></div><div class="framer-clbo4f" data-framer-name="Control"><div class="framer-1r3hs88-container"><div class="framer-ocjty framer-kyu29c framer-styles-preset-aqcnf3" data-styles-preset="aGbWDzhqU" style="--framer-text-alignment:center;--framer-text-color:var(--extracted-1lwpl3i, var(--token-cd760577-4317-4691-be28-d635a64368a1, rgb(255, 255, 255)))">Using Promoto has completely transformed how we engage with our customers. Our campaigns are now faster, smarter, and more effective than ever.</h5></div><div class="framer-9r5m7g" data-framer-name="Review 2" data-framer-component-type="RichTextContainer" style="--extracted-1lwpl3i:var(--token-cd760577-4317-4691-be28-d635a64368a1, rgb(255, 255, 255));--framer-paragraph-spacing:0px;opacity:0;transform:none"><h5 class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-aqcnf3" data-styles-preset="aGbWDzhqU" style="--framer-text-alignment:center;--framer-text-color:var(--extracted-1lwpl3i, var(--token-cd760577-4317-4691-be28-d635a64368a1, rgb(255, 255, 255)))">Promoto transformed how we connect with our customers. The automation workflows saved us hours each week and boosted engagement instantly.</h5></div><div class="framer-14mr040" data-framer-name="Review 3" data-framer-component-type="RichTextContainer" style="--extracted-1lwpl3i:var(--token-cd760577-4317-4691-be28-d635a64368a1, rgb(255, 255, 255));--framer-paragraph-spacing:0px;opacity:0;transform:none"><h5 class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-aqcnf3" data-styles-preset="aGbWDzhqU" style="--framer-text-alignment:center;--framer-text-color:var(--extracted-1lwpl3i, var(--token-cd760577-4317-4691-be28-d635a64368a1, rgb(255, 255, 255)))">I’ve tried several marketing tools, but Promoto’s ease of use and powerful integrations make it stand out. Our campaigns feel smarter and more personalized.</h5></div><div class="framer-1qlcbfk" data-framer-name="Review 4" data-framer-component-type="RichTextContainer" style="--extracted-1lwpl3i:var(--token-cd760577-4317-4691-be28-d635a64368a1, rgb(255, 255, 255));--framer-paragraph-spacing:0px;opacity:0;transform:none"><h5 class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-aqcnf3" data-styles-preset="aGbWDzhqU" style="--framer-text-alignment:center;--framer-text-color:var(--extracted-1lwpl3i, var(--token-cd760577-4317-4691-be28-d635a64368a1, rgb(255, 255, 255)))">The analytics and reporting features give us real-time insights. We can see what works and adjust quickly—our ROI has never been this clear.</h5></div><div class="framer-1a0y9ef" data-framer-name="Review 5" data-framer-component-type="RichTextContainer" style="--extracted-1lwpl3i:var(--token-cd760577-4317-4691-be28-d635a64368a1, rgb(255, 255, 255));--framer-paragraph-spacing:0px;opacity:0;transform:none"><h5 class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-aqcnf3" data-styles-preset="aGbWDzhqU" style="--framer-text-alignment:center;--framer-text-color:var(--extracted-1lwpl3i, var(--token-cd760577-4317-4691-be28-d635a64368a1, rgb(255, 255, 255)))">What I love most about Promoto is the support team. They’re quick, helpful, and genuinely care about our success. It feels like they’re part of our team.</h5></div></div><div class="framer-clbo4f" data-framer-name="Control"><div class="framer-1r3hs88-container"><div class="framer-ocjty framer-kyu29c Plus, you can connect via APIs or webhooks for even more flexibility.</p></div></div></div><div class="framer-10obbno" data-framer-name="Icon Wrap"><div class="framer-1bfaue8" data-framer-name="Icon" style="transform:none"><div data-framer-component-type="SVG" data-framer-name="Icon" parentsize="0" _constraints="[object Object]" rotation="0" shadows class="framer-ary17w" aria-hidden="true" style="image-rendering:pixelated;flex-shrink:0"><div class="svgContainer" style="width:100%;height:100%;aspect-ratio:inherit"><svg style="width:100%;height:100%;"><use href="#svg9762333575"/></svg></div></div></div></div></div><div class="framer-ph8hpq-container"><!--$--><div class="framer-wGzfy framer-inmrp9 framer-v-inmrp9" data-framer-name="Line Animation" style="height:100%;width:100%"><div class="framer-6sqrc3" data-framer-name="Line" style="background-color:var(--token-8614dda1-38f3-4956-8fc3-799eb4b43336, rgba(0, 27, 16, 0.1))"></div></div><!--/$--></div></div></div><div class="framer-u4c7wi-container" style="will-change:transform;opacity:0;transform:translateX(80px)"><div class="framer-wvKb6 framer-IsIbx framer-FLssP framer-dulovr framer-v-dulovr" data-framer-name="Close - Desktop" data-highlight="true" tabindex="0" style="width:100%"><div class="framer-1qljlui" data-framer-name="Content"><div class="framer-sqp7qt" data-framer-name="Q &amp; On higher-tier plans, you’ll also have access to priority support and dedicated success managers.</p></div></div></div><div class="framer-10obbno" data-framer-name="Icon Wrap"><div class="framer-1bfaue8" data-framer-name="Icon" style="transform:none"><div data-framer-component-type="SVG" data-framer-name="Icon" parentsize="0" _constraints="[object Object]" rotation="0" shadows class="framer-ary17w" aria-hidden="true" style="image-rendering:pixelated;flex-shrink:0"><div class="svgContainer" style="width:100%;height:100%;aspect-ratio:inherit"><svg style="width:100%;height:100%;"><use href="#svg9762333575"/></svg></div></div></div></div></div><div class="framer-ph8hpq-container"><!--$--><div class="framer-wGzfy framer-inmrp9 framer-v-inmrp9" data-framer-name="Line Animation" style="height:100%;width:100%"><div class="framer-6sqrc3" data-framer-name="Line" style="background-color:var(--token-8614dda1-38f3-4956-8fc3-799eb4b43336, rgba(0, 27, 16, 0.1))"></div></div><!--/$--></div></div></div><div class="framer-gvvdol-container" style="will-change:transform;opacity:0;transform:translateX(80px)"><div class="framer-wvKb6 framer-IsIbx framer-FLssP framer-dulovr framer-v-dulovr" data-framer-name="Close - Desktop" data-highlight="true" tabindex="0" style="width:100%"><div class="framer-1qljlui" data-framer-name="Content"><div class="framer-sqp7qt" data-framer-name="Q &amp; A"><div class="framer-1hus9q6" data-framer-name="Question"><div class="framer-1bb6cmj" data-framer-name="What types of businesses use Promoto?" data-framer-component-type="RichTextContainer" style="--extracted-r6o4lv:var(--token-99bd2edb-fae4-4760-b61a-7d5f49cc5192, rgb(0, 27, 16));--framer-paragraph-spacing:0px;transform:none"><p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-b5vt42" data-styles-preset="aVoDoV5DV" style="--framer-text-color:var(--extracted-r6o4lv, var(--token-99bd2edb-fae4-4760-b61a-7d5f49cc5192, rgb(0, 27, 16)))">Is Promoto secure for handling sensitive business data?</p></div></div><div class="framer-1qa3e2d" data-framer-name="Answer" style="opacity:0"><div class="framer-jaghoa" data-framer-name="No credit card is required to start with the Free plan. You can upgrade anytime as your needs grow." data-framer-component-type="RichTextContainer" style="--extracted-r6o4lv:var(--token-99bd2edb-fae4-4760-b61a-7d5f49cc5192, rgb(0, 27, 16));--framer-paragraph-spacing:0px;transform:none"><p class="framer-text framer-styles-preset-apzjug" data-styles-preset="SZavFtrFU" style="--framer-text-color:var(--extracted-r6o4lv, var(--token-99bd2edb-fae4-4760-b61a-7d5f49cc5192, rgb(0, 27, 16)))">Absolutely. Promoto uses industry-standard encryption protocols, secure API authentication, and regular audits to ensure your data stays protected. We’re compliant with major data privacy regulations like GDPR and CCPA, so you can automate with confidence.</p></div></div></div><div class="framer-10obbno" data-framer-name="Icon Wrap"><div class="framer-1bfaue8" data-framer-name="Icon" style="transform:none"><div data-framer-component-type="SVG" data-framer-name="Icon" parentsize="0" _constraints="[object Object]" rotation="0" shadows class="framer-ary17w" aria-hidden="true" style="image-rendering:pixelated;flex-shrink:0"><div class="svgContainer" style="width:100%;height:100%;aspect-ratio:inherit"><svg style="width:100%;height:100%;"><use href="#svg9762333575"/></svg></div></div></div></div></div><div class="framer-ph8hpq-container"><!--$--><div class="framer-wGzfy framer-inmrp9 framer-v-inmrp9" data-framer-name="Line Animation" style="height:100%;width:100%"><div class="framer-6sqrc3" data-framer-name="Line" style="background-color:var(--token-8614dda1-38f3-4956-8fc3-799eb4b43336, rgba(0, 27, 16, 0.1))"></div></div><!--/$--></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="ssr-variant hidden-gt4wdy hidden-72rtr7"><div class="framer-e9fpiy-container"><div class="framer-9fi4u framer-16vfxz0 framer-v-16ptorr" data-framer-name="Tablet + Phone" style="width:100%"><div class="framer-1ehfe70-container" style="transform:translateX(-50%)"><!--$--><div></div><!--/$--></div><div class="framer-oegl57-container" style="will-change:transform;opacity:0;transform:translateX(80px)"><div class="framer-wvKb6 framer-IsIbx framer-FLssP framer-dulovr framer-v-qh7ggw" data-framer-name="Close - Tablet + Phone" data-highlight="true" tabindex="0" style="width:100%"><div class="framer-1qljlui" data-framer-name="Content"><div class="framer-sqp7qt" data-framer-name="Q &amp; We’re compliant with major data privacy regulations like GDPR and CCPA, so you can automate with confidence.</p></div></div></div><div class="framer-10obbno" data-framer-name="Icon Wrap"><div class="framer-1bfaue8" data-framer-name="Icon" style="transform:none"><div data-framer-component-type="SVG" data-framer-name="Icon" parentsize="0" _constraints="[object Object]" rotation="0" shadows class="framer-ary17w" aria-hidden="true" style="image-rendering:pixelated;flex-shrink:0"><div class="svgContainer" style="width:100%;height:100%;aspect-ratio:inherit"><svg style="width:100%;height:100%;"><use href="#svg9762333575"/></svg></div></div></div></div></div><div class="framer-ph8hpq-container"><!--$--><div class="framer-wGzfy framer-inmrp9 framer-v-inmrp9" data-framer-name="Line Animation" style="height:100%;width:100%"><div class="framer-6sqrc3" data-framer-name="Line" style="background-color:var(--token-8614dda1-38f3-4956-8fc3-799eb4b43336, rgba(0, 27, 16, 0.1))"></div></div><!--/$--></div></div></div></div></div></div><div class="ssr-variant hidden-4mukfe hidden-72rtr7"><div class="framer-e9fpiy-container"><div class="framer-9fi4u framer-16vfxz0 framer-v-16ptorr" data-framer-name="Tablet + Phone" style="width:100%"><div class="framer-1ehfe70-container" style="transform:translateX(-50%)"><!--$--><div></div><!--/$--></div><div class="framer-oegl57-container" style="will-change:transform;opacity:0;transform:translateX(80px)"><div class="framer-wvKb6 framer-IsIbx framer-FLssP framer-dulovr framer-v-qh7ggw" data-framer-name="Close - Tablet + Phone" data-highlight="true" tabindex="0" style="width:100%"><div class="framer-1qljlui" data-framer-name="Content"><div class="framer-sqp7qt" data-framer-name="Q &amp;
